product_highlights: TEGO® Sterol — bio-fermented sterol for skin barrier support
Specialty fermentation-derived actives with enhanced purity
Recombinant proteins with consistent batch-to-batch quality
Sustainable biotechnology portfolio with reduced environmental footprint
notes: Evonik's personal care division has made significant investments in biotechnology-derived ingredients. Their biotech portfolio includes bio-fermented sterols, recombinant proteins, and sustainable alternatives to petrochemical-derived ingredients. Evonik's fermentation capabilities enable the production of high-purity actives with consistent quality and a significantly reduced environmental footprint compared to traditional chemical synthesis, meeting growing demand for next-generation sustainable cosmetic ingredients.
